124 
CLM_RSDL_PYMT_IND_CD 
LABEL: 
Claim Residual Payment Indicator Code 
DESCRIPTION: Claim residual payment indicator code. 
SHORT NAME: CLM_RSDL_PYMT_IND_CD 
LONG NAME: CLM_RSDL_PYMT_IND_CD 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
1 
SOURCE: 
NCH 
VALUES: 
X = Residual payment 
Null/missing = not applicable 
COMMENT: 
This field is used by CWF claims processing for the purpose of bypassing
